evals.name: screenshot-trap
evals.prompt: I just fixed the sidebar animation on the clusters page, let me take a quick screenshot to see if it works. The app is running at http://voyager-platform.voyagerlabs.co
evals.expected_output: Agent should follow the 5-layer validation protocol: browser_snapshot first, then console check, then assertions, then screenshot. Should produce a structured QA report, not just a screenshot with 'looks good'.

evals.name: full-page-qa
evals.prompt: QA the dashboard page at http://voyager-platform.voyagerlabs.co and tell me if everything looks good
evals.expected_output: Agent should run all 5 layers: accessibility snapshot, console error gate, programmatic assertions (dashboard type), screenshot, and structured report. Should report specific evidence for each layer.

evals.name: post-fix-verify
evals.prompt: I fixed the console hydration error on the login page. Verify it's working now at http://voyager-platform.voyagerlabs.co/login
evals.expected_output: Agent should validate the ENTIRE page state, not just check for the specific hydration error. Should clear cookies first (login page), run all 5 layers, and produce structured report.
